untranslatable_reason: Market-specific N-day period parameters cannot be fully resolved. Source table shows Period Range values (U.S. bonds: 16-32, Eurobond: 60-80, Eurodollars: 28-60, S&P: 74-08 [incomplete], DAX: 66 [incomplete]) but exact N-day lookback for each market instrument is not clearly specified. The Donchian Channel indicator (dc_upper/dc_lower) approximates N-day breakout logic, but requires explicit period configuration per market that cannot be derived from the incomplete source data. Recommended: Populate N_day_period parameters for each market from the midpoint or specific value of the Period Range before backtesting.
translation_notes: Signal translated as Donchian Channel breakout (price above N-period high = breakout). Exit uses reverse breakout (price below N-period low) as reasonable reversal condition since AUTHOR_SILENT. Original table data incomplete (S&P and DAX rows truncated). This translation requires explicit per-market Donchian period configuration during backtest setup.
